# kaleido_platform_connector_flow (Resource)

Deploys a connector flow (workflow template) from a connector service's embedded definitions, binding it to user-supplied config profiles.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) Environment ID
- `name` (String) Name of the connector flow template (e.g. submission, query)
- `service` (String) Connector service ID

### Optional

- `config_type_bindings` (Map of String) Map of config type name to config profile name-or-ID. Each entry binds a config type referenced by the flow to a concrete config profile.
- `description` (String) Optional description override for the deployed workflow.

### Read-Only

- `current_version` (String) The currently deployed template version.
- `flow_type` (String) The flow type as reported by the deployed workflow (e.g. submission, query).
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
